title: Manager config (deny-unknown-fields)
description: The manager's JSON config file, pointed at by $AGENT_MANAGER_CONFIG (manager-rs config.rs::RawConfig). additionalProperties is FALSE by contract: the process is harness-critical, so a typo'd key must fail loudly at boot, never silently fall back to a default. Publish-agnostic: nothing host-specific is compiled into the binary; every path/hostname/room id arrives here. All *_path/dir fields accept '~'-expansion. NOTE: the live manager-rs binary rejects unknown keys, so `schema_version` becomes writable only from the first rewrite release that knows the field — until then configs simply omit it (absence = version 1).

schema_version.description: Contract version. Absence = 1 (pre-rewrite configs cannot carry it because the current binary denies unknown fields).

creds_path.description: Path to the Matrix credentials JSON — see $defs/matrixCreds.

control_room.description: Matrix room ID the manager reports to and takes !commands from.

agent_name.description: Display name used in manager status messages (e.g. 'janet').

work_dir.description: Directory the agent session starts in. CLI arg overrides this; default $HOME.

rate_limit_hook_path.description: Rate-limit hook drop file ({"resetAt": …}) written by a Claude hook; consumed (deleted) on agent exit. Default ~/.claude/shared/agent-rate-limit.json.

model_override_path.description: Optional model-override file; non-empty contents => '--model <contents>' appended to the agent command.

exit_code_path.description: File the in-tmux shell writes the agent's exit code to. Default ~/.claude/shared/agent-exit-code.

heartbeat_path.description: Heartbeat JSON the manager rewrites every tick (session-state.schema.json#/$defs/heartbeat). Default ~/.claude/shared/agent-manager-heartbeat.json.

sessions_dir.description: Claude session-lock directory; stale locks naming our session id are removed before spawn. Default ~/.claude/sessions.

tmux_session.description: tmux session name the agent pane lives in (POSIX hosts; a Windows manager ignores tmux_* fields).

pane_tag.description: Value of the @agent_manager_owner pane user-option that marks OUR pane (stable-pane ownership; never target the active pane).

claude_bin.description: Claude Code binary (name or absolute path).

claude_args.description: Full argument list for the agent process — lab-specific flags live HERE, not in code. --model/--resume/--session-id are appended by the manager.

path_prepend.description: Prepended to PATH inside the agent shell. Default ~/.local/bin.

kill_agent_on_shutdown.description: true (JS-manager parity) = kill the agent pane on manager shutdown. false = leave the agent running and re-adopt on next manager boot (blipless deploys; less battle-tested).

tmux_width.description: Size of a freshly created detached tmux session.

matrixCreds.description: The credentials file creds_path points at (e.g. ~/.claude/shared/janet-account.json). The manager reads exactly these three keys; extra keys are tolerated (the file is shared with other tools).
